title: potentilla arenaria subvar. ternata
intro: Potentilla arenaria subvar. ternata, also known as the silver cinquefoil, is a low-growing, spreading perennial plant with silver-gray foliage and bright yellow flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Potentilla arenaria subvar. ternata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve skin conditions, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
